The Eccellere MSME Growth Path

Three steps to transform your business

Start with proven tools. Power up with AI. Accelerate with expert advisory — at whatever pace works for your business.

Step 01

Start Smart — Self-Help Growth Assets

Pick up diagnostic kits, best-practice playbooks, and ready-to-use frameworks from the marketplace. Cost-effective, immediate, and built for India's MSME realities. No consultant required.

Browse the Marketplace
Step 02

Power Up — AI & Agentic Skills

Layer in Agentic AI to automate, optimise, and accelerate. From AI assessments to autonomous agents, we help you build skills and deploy the right tools for your business — fast.

Explore Agentic AI
Step 03

Go Further — 1-on-1 Consulting Advisory

When you need a focused push on a specific growth challenge, bring in our experts. Deep-dive engagements, board-level strategy, and hands-on implementation to move the trajectory.

Talk to a Consultant

Marketplace

Proven frameworks, newest first

AI Readiness Assessment

Where does your organisation stand on the Agentic AI readiness curve?

5 minutes. Free. Personalised report. Sector-benchmarked.

Take the AI Readiness Assessment →
No signup requiredResults in 5 minsSector benchmarksPersonalised recommendationsFree
I run a mid-size manufacturing unit. Where should I start with AI?
Great question! Based on your sector, I'd recommend starting with our AI Readiness Assessment and then exploring our Lean + AI manufacturing toolkit. Shall I guide you through it?
Yes, and what would it cost?
The assessment is free. The toolkit starts at ₹2,499. I can also connect you with a specialist if you need hands-on support.

Not sure where to start? Let our AI advisor guide you

Tell us about your business challenges. Our AI-powered advisor will recommend the right frameworks, packages, and experts — in under 2 minutes.

Start a Conversation →
